Sorority Row (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,965,282Details
International Box Office $14,770,515
Worldwide Box Office $26,735,797
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,694,351
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $491,612
Total $2,185,963
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,059,802 (42.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,500,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,665 opening theaters/2,665 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,080,637

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 11th, 2009 (Wide) by Summit Entertainment
Video Release: February 23rd, 2010 by Summit Home Video
MPA Rating: R For strong bloody violence, language, some sexuality/nudity and partying
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Prank Gone Wrong
Social setting: Fraternity/Sorority
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Summit Entertainment, Karz Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
